evidence_summary: GLUT2/SLC2A2 is related to human islet glucose transport and insulin secretion; external human-islet and monogenic diabetes evidence supports this candidate.
ARG2/polyamine signaling has been discussed directly in human pancreatic beta cells and T2D pathogenesis.
CLTRN/TMEM27/collectrin is a beta-cell membrane protein linked to beta-cell proliferation, islet physiology and beta-cell mass biomarkers.
PCOLCE2 is reported among human-islet T2D candidate genes and is consistent with extracellular-matrix enrichment in this project.
IAPP/amylin is a classic human islet amyloid component in T2D and is closely linked to beta-cell dysfunction and islet amyloid pathology.
PPP1R1A is reported in human islets as a regulator of GLP1R-mediated insulin secretion and appears in human-islet glucose metabolism studies.
GABRA2 is connected with human islet epigenetic alterations related to mitochondrial function, insulin secretion and T2D.
OPRD1 is reported among functionally tested human-islet T2D candidate genes in the JCI candidate-gene study.
CHL1 is reported among human-islet T2D candidate genes in external functional/epigenetic studies and is a high-effect DEG in this project.
GLRA1 is reported among human-islet T2D candidate genes and is a high-effect DEG in this project.

project_result: FDR significant; effect size below high-effect cutoff
evidence_summary: GLP1R is central to incretin signaling in human islets; this project shows FDR-significant downregulation but a smaller effect size.

project_result: FDR significant; effect size below high-effect cutoff
evidence_summary: PDX1 is a master beta-cell identity and function transcription factor; external evidence links PDX1 methylation/expression changes in human pancreatic islets with insulin secretion and T2D.

evidence_summary: NKX6.1 is a beta-cell transcription factor with literature support for maintaining beta-cell identity and function.

evidence_summary: SLC30A8/ZnT8 is a beta-cell zinc transporter and a well-known T2D susceptibility and insulin secretion gene.
